R

recordFailure() - Method in class org.example.service.LoginAttemptTracker
Records one failed login attempt.
recordSuccess() - Method in class org.example.service.LoginAttemptTracker
Clears failure and lock state after a successful login.

Reloads appointments and redraws the current calendar month.

Reloads and updates data.

Reloads and updates data.
refreshData() - Method in class org.example.presentation.gui.SlotsPanel
Reloads and updates data.

Registers a user through registration service.
registerUser(String, String, String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.UserRegistrationService
Registers a user when validation passes.
REJECTED - Enum constant in enum class org.example.domain.AppointmentNotificationStatus
 
release() - Method in class org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
Marks this slot as available again.
requestPasswordReset(String) - Method in class org.example.presentation.gui.ApplicationController
Requests a password reset code for a user.
requestReset(String) - Method in class org.example.service.PasswordRecoveryService
Sends a reset code when user exists.
RESCHEDULED - Enum constant in enum class org.example.domain.AppointmentStatus
 
ReservationsPanel - Class in org.example.presentation.gui
Shows the logged-in user's reservations and related actions.

Creates a new reservations panel object with the given values.

Creates a new reservations panel object with the given values.

Creates a new reservations panel object with the given values.
RESET_REQUESTED - Enum constant in enum class org.example.service.ForgotPasswordStatus
 
resetPassword(String, String) - Method in class org.example.presentation.gui.ApplicationController
Resets password directly with email and new password.
resetPassword(String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.PasswordRecoveryService
Resets a password directly by user email.
resetPassword(String, String, String, String) - Method in class org.example.presentation.gui.ApplicationController
Resets password after validating reset data.
resetPassword(String, String, String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.PasswordRecoveryService
Resets a password after validating reset code and new password rules.
